actions.name: Hooves
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Mount - Fast transportation with defensive capability
tactical_info.positioning: Primarily mounted combat platform, hoof attacks when threatened
tactical_info.damage_output: 7 bludgeoning per hit, respectable defensive strikes
tactical_info.key_abilities: High speed (60 ft), large size for mounted combat
tactical_info.weaknesses: Limited combat training, primarily utility creature
tactical_info.synergies: Essential for cavalry, rapid transportation, and mounted warfare
